# livck_statuspage (Data Source)

Look up an existing status page by its public id (e.g. one managed outside of Terraform).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "livck_statuspage" "existing" {
  id = "<statuspage_public_id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Public id of the status page to look up.

### Read-Only

- `access_type` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `published` (Boolean)
- `slug` (String)
